name: nginx_up
definition: Status of the last metric scrape from NGINX stub_status; 1=reachable 0=unreachable or NGINX down
absence_means: NGINX is down OR exporter cannot reach stub_status endpoint

name: promhttp_metric_handler_requests_total
definition: Total number of scrape requests to the exporter /metrics endpoint by HTTP status code; code=200 indicates success
absence_means: Exporter is not being scraped; check scrape job configuration

name: nginx_connections_accepted
definition: Cumulative count of client connections accepted by NGINX since process start
absence_means: NGINX is receiving zero connections — check upstream routing or nginx_up
cardinality_footguns: Low cardinality per instance; safe to group-by instance

name: nginx_connections_handled
definition: Cumulative count of connections handled by NGINX (no resource limits hit); accepted - handled = dropped connections
absence_means: Same as accepted absence — routing or nginx_up issue; if below accepted indicates drops

name: nginx_http_requests_total
definition: Total count of HTTP requests processed by NGINX since process start
absence_means: No HTTP traffic flowing; check routing and nginx_up
cardinality_footguns: Low cardinality per instance; note requests >> connections when keep-alive active

name: nginx_connections_active
definition: Current number of active client connections including connections in reading/writing/waiting states
absence_means: No active connections — NGINX idle or down
cardinality_footguns: Low cardinality; equals reading + writing + waiting

name: nginx_connections_reading
definition: Current connections where NGINX is reading the HTTP request header from the client
absence_means: No connections in header-read state — normal under low load
cardinality_footguns: Low cardinality; sustained nonzero indicates slow clients or large headers

name: nginx_connections_waiting
definition: Current idle keep-alive connections waiting for the next HTTP request
absence_means: Keep-alive disabled or all connections actively processing — check traffic pattern
cardinality_footguns: Low cardinality; high waiting is healthy and expected under keep-alive

name: nginx_connections_writing
definition: Current connections where NGINX is writing the HTTP response back to the client
absence_means: No active responses being sent — no traffic or all requests are in header reading phase
cardinality_footguns: Low cardinality; sustained high writing with stable request rate indicates backend latency

name: process_cpu_seconds_total
definition: Total user and system CPU time consumed by the nginx-prometheus-exporter process in seconds (cumulative)
absence_means: Exporter process metric missing — scrape configuration issue
cardinality_footguns: Low cardinality per instance; this is exporter CPU not NGINX CPU

name: process_resident_memory_bytes
definition: Resident set size (RSS) memory used by the nginx-prometheus-exporter process in bytes
absence_means: Exporter process metric missing; expected ~15-25 MB normally
cardinality_footguns: Low cardinality per instance; this is exporter memory not NGINX memory

name: go_goroutines
definition: Number of goroutines currently running in the nginx-prometheus-exporter Go runtime
absence_means: Exporter Go runtime metric missing; expect ~10-20 at steady state
cardinality_footguns: Low cardinality per instance; this is exporter goroutines not NGINX processes

name: go_memstats_heap_alloc_bytes
definition: Heap memory currently allocated and in use by the nginx-prometheus-exporter Go runtime
cardinality_footguns: Low cardinality per instance; this is exporter heap memory

name: go_memstats_heap_sys_bytes
definition: Total heap memory obtained from the OS by the nginx-prometheus-exporter Go runtime
cardinality_footguns: Low cardinality per instance; used as denominator in heap utilization derived signal

name: NOT_APPLICABLE
definition: NGINX stub_status does not expose cost-related metrics. Cost proxy: nginx_http_requests_total (request volume as billing proxy for hosted environments) and nginx_connections_accepted (connection overhead).
